present.mrs: Mrs Bubbly says good morning to everyone.
present.mr: Mr Bubbly says nothing until he has his coffee.

past.mrs: Mrs Bubbly said hello to all her neighbours.
past.mr: Mr Bubbly said the wrong thing at the wrong time.

future.mrs: Mrs Bubbly will say thank you and goodbye.
future.mr: Mr Bubbly will say something but nobody will understand.

perfect.mrs: Mrs Bubbly has said something kind to everyone today.
perfect.mr: Mr Bubbly has said sorry five times today.

present.mrs: Mrs Bubbly smiles at everyone she meets.
present.mr: Mr Bubbly smiles when he sees biscuits.

past.mrs: Mrs Bubbly smiled all day at the party.
past.mr: Mr Bubbly smiled when he found the TV remote.

future.mrs: Mrs Bubbly will smile every day.
future.mr: Mr Bubbly will smile when dinner is ready.

perfect.mrs: Mrs Bubbly has smiled all day long.
perfect.mr: Mr Bubbly has smiled twice today. Both times at food.

present.mrs: Mrs Bubbly lives a happy and full life.
present.mr: Mr Bubbly lives a quiet and comfortable life.

past.mrs: Mrs Bubbly lived in France for one year.
past.mr: Mr Bubbly lived next to the sea and never went in.

future.mrs: Mrs Bubbly will live every day with joy.
future.mr: Mr Bubbly will live happily in his chair.

perfect.mrs: Mrs Bubbly has lived a wonderful life.
perfect.mr: Mr Bubbly has lived a very comfortable life.
